eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 9:00 AM on MAY 26, 2026 Effective until 9:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is only a test. The following is a Required Weekly Test of the Emergency Alert System, originating from the Missouri State Emergency Management Agency in Jefferson City and coordinated with the local broadcasters in your community. This is only a test.
